The '''74-Y''' was a popular model of civilian [[speeder bike]] manufactured by the [[Aratech Repulsor Company]]. It was built for speed rather than survivability. During the [[Clone Wars]], the company began producing a militarized version of the bike known as the [[74-Z speeder bike]].<ref name="S&S" /> Rejecting the [[BARC speeder]]s of the [[Grand Army of the Republic]], the [[Galactic Empire]] used the older, 74-Z model.<ref name="HC 7">{{HelmetCollectionCite|7|Helmets}}</ref> By the [[Imperial Era]], the 74-Y had been discontinued.<ref name="S&S" />
